inputs.description: GitHub Personal Access Token for github.com/qubitlyventures — create at github.com/settings/tokens with scopes: repo, read:org, read:user, workflow.
Supabase Project Reference ID — found in Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → General → Project ID. Leave blank to connect to all projects in your org.
Dodo Payments API key — use dodo_test_... for development, live key for production. Found in Dodo Payments Dashboard → Developers → API Keys.
Dodo Payments webhook signing key — found in Dodo Payments Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks. Required for webhook signature verification.
Dodo Payments environment: 'test_mode' for development, 'live_mode' for production.

Cloudflare API token — create at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens. Recommended permissions: Zone > DNS (Edit), Cloudflare Pages (Edit), Account > Cloudflare Pages (Edit). Add Workers permissions later if needed.
fal.ai API key — create at fal.ai/dashboard/keys. Gives access to 1,000+ image, video, audio, and 3D models.
